Non-GAAP/adjustment-style row rather than recurring SG&A.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal exists, so selected the best overhead buckets. Excluded depreciation & amortization, impairment/credit losses, interest, and balancing/total rows. candidates.why: Best direct interest expense line and broadest label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

Interest-related but narrower than the main interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Lease-specific interest, too narrow for primary XINT unless nothing else exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, too narrow for primary XINT.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list uses the broad reported interest expense line first, with the alternative net-of-capitalized-interest label as fallback for years where reporting changes.

Single equity component, not total book equity.

Gain/loss line, not book equity.
